login.title: Krug Fleet
login.subtitle: Manager
login.description: Sign in to access the Fleet Management System.
login.hintSync: Tip: If you created users in another browser, you can transfer them in the Admin panel under "Users" → "Transfer Users" using a sync code.

vehicles.title: Vehicle Fleet
vehicles.subtitle: Showing {{filtered}} of {{total}} vehicles
vehicles.search: Search by VIN, make, model, drive type…
vehicles.noDataHint: Upload a CSV file to get started.

qrDialog.title: Print QR Codes
qrDialog.desc: Select the vehicles for which QR codes should be printed as PDF. 8 codes (6x6 cm) are printed per DIN A4 page.

vehicleDetail.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the vehicle with VIN {{vin}}? All associated documents and photos will also be deleted.

mail.addIncomingDesc: Manually add a received email to the vehicle file.
mail.subject: Subject
mail.notConfigured: Email sending not configured (EmailJS). Email saved locally.

vehicleDetail.notePlaceholder: Enter a note about this vehicle or file…

docs.title: Documents & Photos
docs.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
docs.uploadDesc: Enter a descriptive name, then select the file.
docs.labelPlaceholder: e.g. Damage report, Registration, Front view …
docs.dropTypes: PDF, JPG, PNG, GIF, WEBP, BMP · max. 50 MB
docs.errorType: Only PDF and image files (JPG, PNG, GIF, WEBP, BMP) are allowed.
docs.errorSave: Error saving file. Please try again.

import.title: Import data
import.subtitle: Upload a CSV file. New data will be merged with existing records by VIN.
import.infoFormat1: First row = column headers (VIN, Make, …), each following row = one vehicle
import.infoFormat2: First column = field names (VIN, Make, …), each following column = one vehicle
import.infoMerge: On re-import, missing fields are added by VIN. Existing values are preserved.
import.errorOnlyCSV: Only CSV files (.csv, .txt) are supported. For Excel files please export as CSV first.
import.errorNoData: No valid vehicle data found. Please check the file format.

admin.title: User management
admin.subtitle: Manage access to the Fleet Manager system.

roles.adminDesc: Full access: read, edit, delete, user management
roles.customRolesDesc: Create custom roles based on "Editor" or "Viewer" and assign them to users.
roles.roleFormDesc: Custom roles are based on a built-in role and inherit its base permissions.
roles.roleNamePlaceholder: e.g. Case worker, Auditor, Field staff…
roles.deleteDesc: The role {{name}} will be deleted. Users with this role will be automatically reset to the base role "{{base}}".
roles.editorBaseDesc: Can edit data and import files

groups.title: User groups
groups.desc: Combine users into groups and manage permissions group-wide.
groups.name: Group name
groups.formDesc: Define name, color and permissions of the group.
groups.deleteDesc: The group {{name}} will be deleted. Members will be unassigned.

columns.title: Configure columns
columns.hint: Click Configure to edit a user's column settings.

colorLegend.title: Color legend
colorLegend.desc: Define the meaning of color markings.

detailFields.title: Custom fields
detailFields.desc: Additional fields shown in the vehicle file.
detailFields.fieldDesc: The column appears in the vehicle file under "Custom Fields".

vehicleAccess.title: Vehicle access
vehicleAccess.desc: Define which vehicles a user may view.

docPerms.title: Document Permissions per User
docPerms.desc: Define which actions a user is allowed to perform.

backups.title: Backups
backups.restoreDesc: The current data will be replaced with the backup from {{date}}. This action cannot be undone.
backups.deleteDesc: The backup from {{date}} will be permanently deleted.

form.name: Name
form.errorEmail: A valid email address is required.
form.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
form.errorEmailTaken: This email address is already in use.

admin.addDesc: Fill in all fields to create a new user.
admin.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}} ({{email}})?

email.title: Email Notifications
email.desc: Configure EmailJS so that new users and vehicles can send/receive emails.
email.howto2: Add an email service (e.g. Gmail, Outlook, custom SMTP)
email.howto3b: Create Template 2 for vehicle emails (with Reply-To: {{reply_to}})
email.howto4: Enter Service ID, both Template IDs and Public Key here and save
email.howto5: Optional: Enter your own domain for vehicle addresses
email.replyToHint: In the vehicle template, Reply-To must be set to {{reply_to}} so replies reach the vehicle address.
email.templateIdHint: For login credential emails to new users
email.vehicleTemplateIdHint: For emails sent from the vehicle file
email.mailDomainHint: Emails to fzg.VIN@DOMAIN are assigned to the vehicle

credentials.title: User created
credentials.desc: The new user was created successfully. Share the following credentials.
credentials.manualHint: Please share the credentials manually with the user. You can set up email sending in the Email tab.

folderUpload.title: Bulk Folder Upload
folderUpload.subtitle: Folder names = VIN numbers · Add multiple folders at once via drag & drop or button
folderUpload.infoStep1: Create folders whose names are each a VIN.
folderUpload.infoStep2: Place the vehicle documents in the respective VIN folder.
folderUpload.infoStep3: Drag as many folders as you like into the zone, or add them one by one via the button.
folderUpload.infoTip: Tip: All VIN folders can also be bundled inside a parent folder.
folderUpload.dropSub: Multiple folders at once · or click to select
folderUpload.unmatchedWarning: {{count}} folder(s) could not be matched to any vehicle and will be skipped. Check that the folder names exactly match the VIN numbers.
folderUpload.noVehiclesWarning: No vehicles loaded yet – please upload a list under "Import" first.
folderUpload.doneHint: The imported documents are now visible in the vehicle file under Documents and Photos and can be viewed and downloaded there.
